subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses with truth in this Prison, which God hath made the Most Great Scene [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق فی هذا السجن الذی جعله الله المنظر الاکبر تنزل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @chastisement and requital
